title: BitPay Invoice
description: A time-sensitive payment request created on the BitPay platform with a fixed price in fiat currency and cryptocurrency equivalents locked at exchange rates expiring in 15 minutes.

url.description: URL to the hosted invoice checkout page.

price.description: Invoice price in the specified currency.

currency.description: ISO 4217 3-character currency code for the invoice.

invoiceTime.description: Invoice creation timestamp in Unix milliseconds.

expirationTime.description: Invoice expiration timestamp in Unix milliseconds.

currentTime.description: Current server timestamp in Unix milliseconds.

btcPrice.description: BTC equivalent price locked at invoice creation.

rate.description: BTC/fiat exchange rate at invoice creation.

exceptionStatus.description: Exception status for underpaid or overpaid invoices.

itemDesc.description: Invoice description displayed on the checkout page.

posData.description: Merchant passthru variable for correlating invoices with orders.

guid.description: Merchant passthru GUID for order lookup.

notificationURL.description: Webhook URL for invoice status notifications.
